experience.description: Built a question-answering system using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to answer academic questions, involving data collection, chunking, hybrid retrieval, prompt templating with Gemini Pro/Flash, LLM-as-a-judge evaluation, and a Streamlit UI.

Developed an AI model for Visual Question Answering (VQA) to generate full-sentence answers from images, achieving a BLEU score of 0.5978. Designed a pipeline transforming VQA classification into a generation task using Gemini 1.5 Flash, incorporating image/text preprocessing, ResNet-50 for feature extraction, LSTM for question encoding, and a decoder with Beam Search.
